defaults.toyStyle: original soft plush plus premium designer blind-box collectible proportions, cute and warm, not photorealistic
negative: direct imitation of commercial toy IP

scenes.title: 海口第一次看海和演唱会

approvedPreview: user-provided preview image with sunglasses on head and approved face shape

scenes.stage: Haikou memory stage: dark stadium, golden wheat field, red haze, low circular amber floor lights, one cool white spotlight, subtle sea-breeze sunset feeling.
scenes.toyStyle: original cute collectible toy, soft plush texture mixed with premium blind-box proportions, rounded head, gentle eyes, compact body, handmade finish
mustPreserve: approved preview face direction: narrower soft oval face, delicate jawline, calmer less-round eyes, smaller nose and mouth, more elegant expression
tiny sparkle detail near the eye or forehead
black sunglasses resting on top of the head, not covering the eyes
black mini dress or fitted black top silhouette

privacy.notes: User allows external services, but report service/model and uploaded inputs.

mustAvoid: Jellycat name or direct design imitation
Pop Mart name or direct design imitation
